understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level while avoiding spike tiles, using limited steps/attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) shifts player position on grid; gravity (DOWN) influences falling/landing and can change y coords during moves; CLICK removes specific clickable tiles (e.g. obstacles); spikes cause immediate failure; no undo observed; each action consumes a step with turn limits.
